pageContext.name: Back to the Future Power Idolz
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Numskull are proud to present the Back to the Future Power Idolz Wireless Charger!   On the hunt for a wireless charging dock that looks like it's from the future? We traveled with Marty and Doc Brown to pick up this awesome collectible featuring a design based on the Back To The Future retro VHS case! This is officially part of the Power Idolz range, a collectible series of wireless charging docks with designs based on retro packaging of your favorite movies, TV shows and video games.  Add to your geeky collection and bag yourself this awesome, high-quality collectible series of wireless charging docks!
